name: contentgpt
description: ContentGPT — a fast, clean, Mac-style AI content chatbot powered by Manifest.build

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run start" "npm --prefix frontend run start"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
